missions.name: Bunker Protect — Patient Cylinder
missions.briefing: Pilot — one of our asteroid bunkers has stopped being quiet. The colonies on a neighbouring rock take an interest in our hardware sometimes; the patient-pig in the cylinder cannot defend itself, and you can. Clear the bunker and reboot the suspension before the cycle lapses. Treat the pig with the dignity you would treat a person who is asleep — the difference between the two is, in our practice, smaller than the literature will tell you. — Sumiko

missions.name: Bunker Extract — Organ Recovery
missions.briefing: Pilot — the patient-pig has done its work and the organ is ready for harvest. Clear the bunker, recover the organ case, and deliver it to the human recipient before the thermal window closes. There will be a clock, but this is not a race; speed only matters if the case stays cold and steady. One of these deliveries goes to an old patient of ours — the orbit is strange, and you may find the place quieter than you expect. They will not be in a state to talk back. — Sumiko

missions.name: Patient Rescue — Field Recovery
missions.briefing: Pilot — a patient of ours is caught on a viroid run they should not have been on. You will recognize them by their suit colour; the others on the asteroid are also worth saving, but the patient is the one we are paid to bring back. If the file closes, please let it not be on a day we asked you to keep it open. — Sumiko
